name: Ashley Gunnell

transcripts.q3:
Hi. This is Ashley gonal. I have 12 years experience working with infants, and I'm also experience with other ages ages 5 and younger, and also school age. I love working with children, especially babies, and infants, and toddlers. That's my favorite age to work with, but I love all children. I think there's so much fun and they everyday is different when you're working with kids. So that's why I would like to work with.
 Kids, thank you.
transcripts.q4: I live in Murray Utah which is 84 107 and I would be willing to work around Salt Lake City, Murray area Mill Creek. Maybe three to five miles from where I live. Thank you so much.
transcripts.q5: I will be needing part-time. I have another job and I work nights. So I would like to work during the day for four to six to eight hours a day. Thank you.
transcripts.q6: Yes, I have dealt with conflict with children and I just remove the children from each other. Make sure the other child is, okay, give them lots of TLC and make sure that whatever the injury is is properly handled. And then always make an incident report so the parents know exactly what happened.
transcripts.q7: I think I would make a great up kid teacher, because I'm flexible. I'm easygoing. I'm hard-working. I'm responsible and reliable, and I have a positive attitude.

ai_summary: Ashley brings 12 years of formal infant and toddler experience with a clear passion for early childhood education. She handles conflicts calmly by separating children, providing comfort, and documenting incidents for parents.
